def solve(nums : Array(Int64), k : Int64) : Int64
  nums.sort!
  n = nums.length
  max_len = 1
  for i in 0...n
    target = nums[i] * k
    low = i
    high = n - 1
    best_j = i
    while low <= high
      mid = (low + high) // 2
      if nums[mid] <= target
        best_j = mid
        low = mid + 1
      else
        high = mid - 1
      end
    end
    current_len = best_j - i + 1
    if current_len > max_len
      max_len = current_len
    end
  end
  return n - max_len
end

function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {

    nums.sort((a, b) => a - b);

    let maxLen = 1;

    const n = nums.length;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        const target = nums[i] * k;

        let low = i;

        let high = n - 1;

        let bestJ = i;

        while (low <= high) {

            const mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);

            if (nums[mid] <= target) {

                bestJ = mid;

                low = mid + 1;

            } else {

                high = mid - 1;

            }

        }

        const currentLen = bestJ - i + 1;

        if (currentLen > maxLen) {

            maxLen = currentLen;

        }

    }

    return n - maxLen;

}
